Penpot plugins API
    Preparing search index...
    • Stroke

    Interface Stroke

    Represents stroke properties in Penpot. You can add a stroke to any shape except for groups. This interface includes properties for defining the color, style, width, alignment, and caps of a stroke.

    interface Stroke {
        strokeColor?: string;
        strokeColorRefFile?: string;
        strokeColorRefId?: string;
        strokeOpacity?: number;
        strokeStyle?: "svg" | "none" | "mixed" | "solid" | "dotted" | "dashed";
        strokeWidth?: number;
        strokeAlignment?: "center" | "inner" | "outer";
        strokeCapStart?: StrokeCap;
        strokeCapEnd?: StrokeCap;
        strokeColorGradient?: Gradient;
    }
    • Defined in index.d.ts:3984
    Index

    Properties

    strokeColor? strokeColorRefFile? strokeColorRefId? strokeOpacity? strokeStyle? strokeWidth? strokeAlignment? strokeCapStart? strokeCapEnd? strokeColorGradient?

    Properties

    OptionalstrokeColor

    strokeColor?: string

    The optional color of the stroke, represented as a string (e.g., '#FF5733').

    • Defined in index.d.ts:3988

    OptionalstrokeColorRefFile

    strokeColorRefFile?: string

    The optional reference to an external file for the stroke color.

    • Defined in index.d.ts:3992

    OptionalstrokeColorRefId

    strokeColorRefId?: string

    The optional reference ID within the external file for the stroke color.

    • Defined in index.d.ts:3996

    OptionalstrokeOpacity

    strokeOpacity?: number

    The optional opacity level of the stroke color, ranging from 0 (fully transparent) to 1 (fully opaque). Defaults to 1 if omitted.

    • Defined in index.d.ts:4001

    OptionalstrokeStyle

    strokeStyle?: "svg" | "none" | "mixed" | "solid" | "dotted" | "dashed"

    The optional style of the stroke.

    • Defined in index.d.ts:4005

    OptionalstrokeWidth

    strokeWidth?: number

    The optional width of the stroke.

    • Defined in index.d.ts:4009

    OptionalstrokeAlignment

    strokeAlignment?: "center" | "inner" | "outer"

    The optional alignment of the stroke relative to the shape's boundary.

    • Defined in index.d.ts:4013

    OptionalstrokeCapStart

    strokeCapStart?: StrokeCap

    The optional cap style for the start of the stroke.

    • Defined in index.d.ts:4017

    OptionalstrokeCapEnd

    strokeCapEnd?: StrokeCap

    The optional cap style for the end of the stroke.

    • Defined in index.d.ts:4021

    OptionalstrokeColorGradient

    strokeColorGradient?: Gradient

    The optional gradient stroke defined by a Gradient object.

    • Defined in index.d.ts:4025
